query: Panorama Nordic Loppet cross country ski race Invermere

videos.title: Explore Cross-Country Skiing in BC's Kootenay Rockies Region
videos.description:
The Kootenay region of British Columbia offers a wealth of nordic trails and terrain to explore. Add the spectacular mountain scenery, small-town experience and cool mountain culture. 

450+ KM of Groomed Trails. Endless Adventure. Authentic Kootenay Culture.

Experience winter wonderland on the Kootenay side of the Rockies, where small-town culture and a passion for cross-country skiing converge to provide a wealth of groomed and touring trails to explore. Get outside this winter to revive your free spirit and challenge your stamina in a safe, inspiring and healthy environment.

#KootenayXC

To learn more visit https://www.kootenayxc.com/

Fernie - Kimberley - Invermere/Panorama - Nelson - Rossland - Arrow Slocan - Golden - Castlegar - Radium Hot Springs & Nipika

videos.title: 2011 Hog Loppet
videos.description: Cross-country ski trek from the top of Mission Ridge above Wenatchee, Washinton, USA to Blewett Pass, some 21 miles away. Lots of fun!

videos.title: Canadian Worldloppet: Gatienau Loppet
videos.description: In 2021 the Canadian Worldloppet event, the Gatineau Loppet, has to take place virtually. Register on the website, do your race at home and upload your gps-file to the result list.
